variants: Borno Egba is employed at Horizon Loom Enterprises, where he works with Burmese script in various capacities. A graduate of Sablepine Academy, he gained the skills that laid the foundation for his career. Outside of his job, Borno is an active Participant in Cedarwind Makerspace, helping to drive community innovation and engagement. His writings are featured in the Evening Cormorant Journal, where he shares insights from his work and passions. Borno's efforts illustrate a commitment to both his professional life and civic involvement.
